summary: Iteration 4 (AIChat refactor into 4 files: AIChat.jsx + ChatHeader/MessageList/MessageInput + useChatStream hook). Verified zero behavioral regression. All 3 critical backend endpoints (products, login, ai/chat) return 200 with valid payloads, including full Claude streamed reply. All 6 AIChat E2E flows pass (button visible & positioned correctly, open, send-via-button, Enter-key send, close, floating-button restoration). Farmer login regression passes (dashboard loads).
passed: POST /api/ai/chat -> 200, streamed Claude response (~1.1KB, valid MSP explanation)
Home page loads, no error elements detected
AIChat floating button visible at (1277,608) - bottom-24 right-6, no overlap with Emergent badge
ai-chat-open click opens panel, greeting 'Namaste! I'm your KisanBaazar AI...' visible
ai-chat-input + ai-chat-send triggers streaming reply (user message 'What is PM-KISAN?' rendered, AI response received)
Enter-key send works (user msg 'Hi' rendered in chat)
ai-chat-close closes panel and restores floating button
Farmer login (farmer@kisanbaazar.in/farmer123) -> /dashboard/farmer with stats (Active Listings, Orders Received, Total Revenue) and List Product CTA
notes: Buyer login, theme toggle, language switcher, cart-add regression NOT re-executed this iteration since AIChat refactor is isolated and prior iterations (2: 16/16, 3: 10/10) covered them. Razorpay payment remains MOCKED per problem statement.
